Operation 'post-bookings-by-bookingId-confirm' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, unclear_purpose, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary is just the HTTP method and path, providing no semantic value. Original description is unclear about the operation's purpose and mixes API naming with functionality. Improved version: (1) provides action-oriented summary, (2) clarifies when this operation should be used (in-person payment scenario), (3) explains the booking ID requirement, (4) specifies the return value, (5) documents state changes (status transitions), and (6) helps AI agents understand the conditional use case (Stripe Connect not configured). This enables better agent decision-making about when to invoke this operation.

data.current_description: Booking Confirmation API - Pay in Person Confirms bookings without online payment when Stripe Connect isn't set up
data.summary_suggestion: Confirm a booking with in-person payment
data.description_suggestion: Confirms a booking and marks it as paid when using in-person payment methods. This operation is used when Stripe Connect is not configured or when the booking should be processed as a cash/in-person payment. Requires the booking ID as a path parameter. Returns the confirmed booking object with updated status. The booking status transitions from pending to confirmed, and payment status is marked as completed.
data.reasoning: Original summary is just the HTTP method and path, providing no semantic value. Original description is unclear about the operation's purpose and mixes API naming with functionality. Improved version: (1) provides action-oriented summary, (2) clarifies when this operation should be used (in-person payment scenario), (3) explains the booking ID requirement, (4) specifies the return value, (5) documents state changes (status transitions), and (6) helps AI agents understand the conditional use case (Stripe Connect not configured). This enables better agent decision-making about when to invoke this operation.
